title: ctenopsis cerasiformis
intro: Ctenopsis cerasiformis, also known as the Chinese angelica tree, is a type of plant native to China. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Apiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ctenopsis cerasiformis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, and it can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture.
